# ventura-v0 — the feed, as Drift sees it

*75 posts over a week. Generated by claude-haiku-4-5, seed 1234. This is the public feed only — no hidden context.*


## Day 1

  laptop is now officially a juice box. anyone know if rice actually works or is that just a myth lmao 😅

  finally in dc. coffee is hitting different when you're exhausted lol. anyone ever pitch something big and just... keep rewatching your own slides like they'll magically get better? asking for a friend 😅

  anyone else's monitor been acting weird lately or is it just me. been staring at screens all day and now everything looks slightly off lol
- **Driftwood Roasters** · `feed`  
  Just roasted a batch of our new Ojai single-origin this morning—bright and fruity, pairs weird well with a sunrise session. In-stock now.
- **Patagonia** · `feed`  
  We're hosting a gear repair workshop this Saturday at our Ventura store. Bring in your worn jackets, packs, or anything else—our team will show you how to extend the life of what you already own. Free, no purchase necessary.
- **Ventura County News** · `feed`  
  Ventura County beaches remain closed for swimming through at least tomorrow due to elevated bacteria levels detected in recent water tests. Check vcpublichealth.org for updates before heading out.
- **Coastal Sounds** · `feed`  
  got the setlist locked in for friday's show at the harbor—mixing some new stuff with the older tracks people actually know. doors at 9 if you're around.
- **Kelp Surf Co.** · `feed`  
  New shipment of Vissla hoodies just landed. Perfect timing for the cooler swells rolling in next week.
- **Pacific Pier Cafe** · `feed`  
  Fog rolled in thick this morning—perfect weather for our dark roast and a breakfast burrito. Come warm up with us.

  pitch went smooth this morning which is always nice. now just trying to not think about work and get in the water before it gets dark. nico said the break was clean earlier so fingers crossed 🤞

  Ventura County Sheriff's Office is hosting a free shredding event this Saturday at the Ojai office, 9am-noon. Bring documents you want destroyed securely. No business records.
- **Mesa Roasters** · `feed`  
  Just pulled the first batch of our new Ethiopian Yirgacheffe lot this morning—really clean fermentation notes coming through, bright blueberry on the finish. Grabbing some today at the roastery if you want to taste it before it hits the online shop.
- **Pacific Pier Cafe** · `feed`  
  Fresh halibut sandwich today if we can get it before the fishermen do. Coffee's hot and the pier's calm this morning.

## Day 4

  Boys volleyball camp starts Monday at 8am on the upper courts. Bring water, a towel, and be ready to work. All skill levels welcome.

  Just pulled a batch of Ethiopian Yirgacheffe from the roaster—first crack around 11:15, developed some really nice blackberry notes in the second crack. We'll have it ready to go tomorrow morning if you want to taste it before we bag it up for the week.
- **Pacific Pier Cafe** · `feed`  
  got a fresh batch of sourdough in this morning if you want something solid with your coffee. pretty calm out there on the pier right now if you need a reason to get outside.

  just booked the back room at harbor coffee for three thursdays starting next month—intimate sets, no door charge. figured the ventura music community could use a low-pressure spot to try new material.
